task: Build Run Monitor page for MultiAgent Control Panel

Use agentName instead of stageName on RunStage — stageName field does not exist in shared types
Socket base URL derived by stripping /api from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL (NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL not used)
Emit 'join' with { runId } object to enter WebSocket room
Events: 'log', 'run:status', 'stage:status' (not the names in original spec)
Page.tsx is server component — no 'use client' needed
next_steps: Run npm install in multiagent/web/ to install @xyflow/react, socket.io-client, @tanstack/react-query
Add vitest or jest test framework to multiagent/web before writing tests
Consider adding connection status indicator in RunHeader (green/yellow/red dot)

WebSocket: NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL env var not set — production WS URL derived from API URL
